content:
• Optional Creative Assignment for Extra XP
• Weekly Challenge for XP & Skill Growth

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Everything we built is preserved.
✔ Ensures each class session is well-structured and gamified.
✔ Maintains balance between academia, engagement, and strategy.

📜 3. RPG System Guide – Game Library & Mechanics

A comprehensive listing of ALL in-game elements students will interact with.

✔ A. Archetypes & Evolution Paths
• Each archetype has:
• A core ability
• A secondary ability
• A faction interaction bonus
• Evolution mechanics (Level 1 → 2 → 3 Unlocks)

✔ B. XP Earning & Spending System
• XP is used for:
• Character Evolution & Unlocking Abilities
